title: Finn Finds Baby Animals
synopsis: Little Finn explores the savanna and discovers adorable baby animals with their families, learning simple animal sounds and names.

pages.text: Finn walks in the warm grass. Look! Baby animals everywhere!

illustration.description: A toddler boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes walking through golden savanna grass with baby animals scattered around him, painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes and warm orange sunset colors
illustration.alt: Finn walking through savanna grass with baby animals

pages.text: Baby elephant says TRUMPET! Big ears flap flap.

illustration.description: A cute baby elephant with big floppy ears next to the boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, painted in gouache with bold confident strokes and textured painterly style in warm savanna colors
illustration.alt: Finn with baby elephant flapping ears

pages.text: Baby lion says ROAR! Soft fuzzy mane.

illustration.description: An adorable baby lion cub with fluffy mane sitting beside the toddler with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, painted with thick brushstrokes in golden grass with orange sunset background
illustration.alt: Finn sitting with baby lion cub

pages.text: Baby giraffe says nothing. Long neck reaches high high high!

illustration.description: A tall baby giraffe bending its long spotted neck down toward the small boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, painted in gouache with warm savanna colors and expressive animal features
illustration.alt: Finn looking up at baby giraffe's long neck

pages.text: Baby zebra says NEIGH! Black and white stripes.

illustration.description: A playful baby zebra with bold black and white stripes next to the boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, painted with thick textured brushstrokes in golden grassland setting
illustration.alt: Finn petting baby zebra with stripes

pages.text: All the mamas come! Finn waves bye bye to his animal friends.

illustration.description: The toddler with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes waving goodbye to baby animals with their mother animals in the background, painted in gouache with warm orange sunset and bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Finn waving goodbye to baby animals and their mothers

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What sound does the baby elephant make?
questions.explanation: The baby elephant says TRUMPET and flaps its big ears!

questions.question: What does the baby zebra have?
questions.explanation: The baby zebra has black and white stripes!

questions.question: What does Finn do at the end?
questions.explanation: Finn waves bye bye to all his animal friends when their mamas come!
